#Weights:

19	20	4	13	9	14	13	12	23	24	26	4	29	29	20	5	25	8	20	29	16	7	19	19	22	28	25	16	26	11	17	24	2	26	6	16	28	25	12	24	29	26	25	13	1	18	16	15	4	23	20	18	23	11	9	6	8	10	18	16	24	29	24	4	22	19	26	10	19	26	27	13	18	4	22	13	29	22	5	23	7	4	24	19	14	13	3	7	13	22	9	25	11	6	4	8	26	27	7	13	30	1	17	9	7	23	6	24	22	3	
99 #capacity

12 #k: cardinality
